description: The International Crisis Group (ICG) is a Brussels-based transnational NGO that conducts field research on violent conflict and advocates for policy solutions. [Robert Malley](/people/robert-malley) served as its president and CEO from 2018 to 2021 before joining the Biden administration as special envoy on Iran. At least two members of the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023) — [Ali Vaez](/people/ali-vaez) and [Dina Esfandiary](/people/dina-esfandiary) — were employed by ICG, with Vaez serving as Iran project director. After the [IEI email leak](/events/iei-email-leak-2023), ICG characterised the initiative as 'an informal platform' supported by European governments and institutions.
editorial_notes: Headquartered in Brussels. Malley was president 2018-2021.
